header.location: Portland, OR (Open to Remote or Relocation)

summary: I'm Jamie—a people-loving program & student-support coordination professional who thrives on solving problems through data analysis, developing programs grounded in evidence, and collaborating with stakeholders for sustainable impact—through human-centered, equity-driven approaches.
